headlines.title: Ukraine’s Drone War Is Reaching Deep Into Russia’s Oil Heartland
headlines.summary: Russia’s Leningrad Oblast lies some 600 kilometers from the closest corner of Ukraine. But on April 15, its governor declared it a “frontline” region. headlines.title: Cenovus Warns Oil Sands Growth Is Drying Up as Policy Uncertainty Mounts
headlines.summary: Cenovus Energy (TSX, NYSE: CVE) just posted one of its strongest quarters on record. headlines.title: US Oil Drillers Continue to Add Rigs
headlines.summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 548, down 30 from this same time last year.
